alt: Two zebras standing head to tail together
caption: Zebras often stay close together and watch in different directions for danger.
location: Phinda Private Game Reserve, South Africa
acquisitionNotes: Manually curated zebra family image with verified species identification. Re-synced canonical Commons URL. Local WebP ingested from https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/f/f2/Burchell%27s_zebra_%28Equus_quagga_burchellii%29_females_head_to_tail.jpg
